title: taraxacum pilosella
intro: Taraxacum pilosella, also known as the hairy dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron, providing health benefits such as improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and supporting immune function. Taraxacum pilosella can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat conditions like arthritis, skin issues, and respiratory problems.
